validationRecipes.name: default
validationRecipes.purpose: Run the repository default correctness gate before reporting completion.

validationRecipes.name: agent-contract
validationRecipes.command: pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File tools/check-ai-integration.ps1; pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File tools/check-json-contracts.ps1
validationRecipes.purpose: Validate AI instructions, manifests, schemas, and generated context.

validationRecipes.name: public-api-boundary
validationRecipes.purpose: Check public headers and backend interop boundaries after public API or handle-boundary changes.

validationRecipes.name: win32-platform
validationRecipes.command: pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File tools/cmake.ps1 --build --preset dev --target MK_win32_platform_tests MK_runtime_ui_workbench_tests MK_runtime_ui_production_stack_tests; pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File tools/ctest.ps1 --preset dev --output-on-failure -R "win32_platform|runtime_ui"; pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File tools/check-public-api-boundaries.ps1
validationRecipes.purpose: Build and test the Windows-native platform foundation, including Win32 runtime/window/message-pump/cursor rows, keyboard/mouse input rows, clipboard/file-dialog/text-input rows, runtime UI contract interaction, and public API boundary checks.

validationRecipes.name: win32-runtime-host
validationRecipes.command: pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File tools/cmake.ps1 --build --preset dev --target MK_runtime_host_win32_tests MK_runtime_host_win32_public_api_compile; pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File tools/ctest.ps1 --preset dev --output-on-failure -R "MK_runtime_host_win32_tests|MK_runtime_host_win32_public_api_compile"; pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File tools/check-public-api-boundaries.ps1; pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File tools/check-native-desktop-contracts.ps1
validationRecipes.purpose: Build and test the Windows-native runtime host and D3D12 presentation foundation, including Win32DesktopGameHost, Win32DesktopEventPump, deterministic NullRenderer fallback, D3D12 swapchain planning, host-supplied shader-bytecode renderer creation, resize/present report rows, and public native-handle isolation.

validationRecipes.name: desktop-editor
validationRecipes.purpose: Build and test the optional native Win32 first-party retained MK_editor shell through the dependency-free desktop-editor preset, including MK_editor_core EditorDockLayout/editor_dock_panel_catalog, EditorDockCommandKind/EditorDockCommandRequest/EditorDockCommandPlan dock mutation planner, EditorRichTextDocument/EditorRichTextViewport/EditorRichTextUiModel/EditorRichTextAiSnapshot, validate_editor_rich_text_document, copy_editor_rich_text_selection_plain_text, make_editor_console_rich_text_document, make_editor_rich_text_view_model, make_editor_rich_text_ai_snapshot coverage, private native_editor_text_font_adapters.cpp DirectWrite text/font adapter validation, private native_editor_text_atlas_handoff.cpp selected text atlas handoff evidence, private native_editor_text_input.cpp focused text-input/IME controller evidence, private native_editor_tsf_text_input.cpp TSF session selection evidence, private native_editor_uia_provider.cpp UI Automation provider evidence, MK_editor_native_shell_tests, and MK_editor_smoke output for editor_shell_ui=first_party, editor_shell_backend=d3d12, editor_shell_imgui=0, editor_shell_panels=11, editor_shell_docking_status=single_window_ready, editor_shell_dock_tab_headers=11, editor_shell_dock_split_gutters=3, editor_shell_dock_active_panels=4, editor_shell_dock_focusable_controls=11, editor_shell_sdl3=0, editor_shell_file_dialog_service=win32, editor_shell_clipboard_service=win32, editor_shell_reviewed_process_runner=win32, editor_shell_viewport_status=diagnostic_only, editor_shell_viewport_native_handles_exposed=0, editor_shell_material_preview_status=diagnostic_only, editor_shell_material_preview_native_handles_exposed=0, editor_shell_text_atlas_handoff_status=glyphs_ready_atlas_handoff_host_gated, editor_shell_text_font_adapter_invoked=1, editor_shell_text_font_glyphs_ready=1, editor_shell_text_font_fallback_used=0, editor_shell_text_atlas_handoff_host_gated_rows=1, editor_shell_text_atlas_handoff_unsupported_rows=1, editor_shell_text_font_native_handles_exposed=0, editor_shell_text_input_service=win32_tsf, editor_shell_ime_service=win32_tsf, editor_shell_ime_status=win32_tsf_selected, editor_shell_ime_text_input_session_rows=0, editor_shell_ime_composition_rows=0, editor_shell_ime_committed_text_rows=0, editor_shell_ime_caret_rect_rows=1, editor_shell_ime_surrounding_text_rows=1, editor_shell_ime_candidate_ui_host_owned=1, editor_shell_ime_native_handles_exposed=0, editor_shell_accessibility_service=win32_uia, editor_shell_accessibility_status=uia_provider_ready, editor_shell_accessibility_nodes, editor_shell_accessibility_role_rows, editor_shell_accessibility_name_rows, editor_shell_accessibility_state_rows, editor_shell_accessibility_focus_rows=1, editor_shell_accessibility_action_rows, editor_shell_accessibility_relationship_rows, editor_shell_accessibility_tree_navigation_rows, editor_shell_accessibility_diagnostics=0, editor_shell_accessibility_missing_name_diagnostics=0, editor_shell_accessibility_missing_role_diagnostics=0, editor_shell_accessibility_invalid_bounds_diagnostics=0, editor_shell_accessibility_hidden_nodes=0, editor_shell_accessibility_unsupported_pattern_diagnostics=0, editor_shell_accessibility_native_handles_exposed=0, editor_shell_renderer_boxes_submitted, and editor_shell_renderer_text_runs_available. The smoke panel count covers Main Menu, Scene, Inspector, Assets, Console, Viewport, Resources, AI Commands, Profiler, Timeline, and Project Settings, with Material Preview represented inside Assets and input_rebinding kept outside the current native shell panel set; docking counters cover single-window tab headers, split gutters, active panels, and focusable dock controls, while console rich-text coverage proves read-only diagnostic spans reach retained UI text runs, the DirectWrite adapter test proves selected `ITextShapingAdapter` / `IFontRasterizerAdapter` output validation plus selected atlas handoff evidence rows, text-input tests prove focused Project Settings text-field session begin/end, composition, commit, cancel, caret rect, surrounding text, strict cursor/selection validation, invalid-target fail-closed behavior, and private TSF session selection, and UIA tests prove private semantic role/name/state/focus/action/relationship/navigation publication with screen-space bounds, hosted-root null runtime id behavior, and child `UiaAppendRuntimeId` partial ids without claiming full app-owned ITextStoreACP callback coverage, native IME candidate UI, reconversion, Direct2D GPU text rendering/upload, broad production shaping, bidi, font fallback, full UIA control pattern/event parity, cross-platform accessibility parity, or rich clipboard formats. The default lane continues to cover MK_editor_core without editor-shell dependencies, and the current editor lane must remain SDL3-free, Dear-ImGui-free in the active MK_editor target, and native handles private to editor implementation files.

validationRecipes.name: desktop-game-runtime
validationRecipes.purpose: Build and test the desktop game runtime lane with Windows-native host evidence first: manifest-linked registered-game metadata with package file path validation, MK_runtime_host tests, MK_runtime_host_win32 public/API tests, Win32 platform tests, WASAPI tests, finite Win32 sample_desktop_runtime_shell smoke execution, DXC-available build-output DXIL shader artifact smoke, DXC SPIR-V CodeGen-available build-output SPIR-V shader artifact smoke, sample_desktop_runtime_game, and committed/generated desktop runtime package smokes through Win32DesktopGameHost / Win32DesktopPresentation.

validationRecipes.name: desktop-runtime-release-package
validationRecipes.purpose: Build the optional Release desktop runtime package, install the selected registered runtime game executable, selected package files, generated desktop-runtime game package metadata with gameManifest and packageFiles paths derived from manifest-driven or literal registration, optional generated D3D12 DXIL and Vulkan SPIR-V shader artifacts for the current sample shell shader-artifact package path, validate installed SDK metadata, validate a clean installed consumer, reject removed desktop runtime adapter DLLs in installed and archived runtime artifacts, validate the installed selected game manifest, package files, shader artifacts, and smoke from metadata, including selected-target cooked package load and renderer-submit proofs when the game metadata requires them, and create the CPack package artifact.

validationRecipes.name: desktop-runtime-shell-d3d12-window-smoke
validationRecipes.purpose: On a Windows host with generated DXIL artifacts and D3D12 support, validate the Win32DesktopGameHost D3D12 game-window RhiFrameRenderer path without exposing D3D12, Win32, or RHI handles to gameplay.

validationRecipes.name: desktop-runtime-generated-scaffold-package
validationRecipes.purpose: Build the selected generated desktop runtime package scaffold lane and validate installed sample_generated_desktop_runtime_package with manifest-derived runtime config package files, metadata-selected --require-config smoke args, and deterministic NullRenderer fallback without D3D12/Vulkan shader artifacts or cooked-scene claims.

validationRecipes.name: desktop-runtime-generated-cooked-scene-scaffold-package
validationRecipes.purpose: Build the selected generated desktop runtime cooked-scene package scaffold lane and validate installed sample_generated_desktop_runtime_cooked_scene_package with manifest-derived config, .geindex, first-party cooked texture/mesh/material/scene files, metadata-selected --require-config plus --require-scene-package smoke args, runtime package loading, renderer-neutral scene submission counters, and deterministic NullRenderer fallback without D3D12/Vulkan shader artifacts or scene GPU binding claims.

validationRecipes.name: desktop-runtime-2d-package-proof
validationRecipes.purpose: Build the selected 2D desktop runtime package proof and validate installed sample_2d_desktop_runtime_package with manifest-derived config, .geindex, first-party cooked texture/material/audio/scene files, metadata-selected --require-config plus --require-scene-package smoke args, cooked package loading, playable 2D scene validation, sprite/HUD/audio counters, packaged D3D12 DXIL shader artifacts, host-gated D3D12 package window smoke, --require-native-2d-sprites native 2D sprite batch execution counters such as native_2d_sprite_batches_executed and native_2d_sprite_batch_texture_binds, --require-production-tile-renderer tile_chunk_renderer_* counters for renderer-neutral visible/opaque/transparent tile cells, sprite/draw rows, texture binds, dirty rebuild rows/cells, light rows, changed light cells, clean diagnostics, and zero backend submission/native texture ownership invocation, --require-world-region-streaming counters for reviewed region load/keep/unload safe-point rows, budget evidence, missing-region diagnostics, reviewed package adoption, RuntimeWorldStreamingLargeSceneReadinessReport status, and navigation path-cache readiness evidence, plus --require-simulation-orchestration gameplay_runtime_scheduler_* counters for deterministic fixed-tick scheduler order, budget-limited steps, command rows, replay hash evidence, world_entity_model_* counters for stable entity/component/region ownership, lifecycle rows, persistence/streaming bridge rows, duplicate rejection, invalid-request bridge rejection diagnostics, fail-closed row suppression, addressable_content_* counters for address/dependency/refcount/load/release rows, resident bytes, budget-limited rejection diagnostics, no package IO, no async execution, no commit, sandbox_world_* counters for generic construction-cost consumption, tile drop, tool effectiveness, spawn region, day/night event, and trigger rows without game-rule execution or game-specific balance catalogs, --require-sandbox-authoring-review sandbox_authoring_review_* counters for deterministic reviewed tile definitions, palette brushes, chunk templates, procedural seeds, changed files, tilemap package changed-file rows, dependency edges, positive preview hash, zero external image decoding, external downloads, importer plugin execution, package apply during review, and diagnostics, plus --require-sandbox-package-budgets sandbox_package_budget_* counters for row/byte/chunk/dirty/draw/light/persistence/streaming limits, replay hash, and zero package IO, native-handle, arbitrary-shell, external-download, source-image-decode, broad-multiplayer, backend-submission, native-texture-ownership, renderer/RHI-residency, and broad-renderer-quality side effects without runtime image decoding and production atlas/editor/runtime integration beyond the reviewed source-image decode and atlas-packing tools, public native/RHI handles, Metal, broad background package streaming, backend-specific tile submission, native texture ownership, renderer/RHI residency, broad production sprite batching readiness, open-world parity, platform async job systems, broad gameplay-rule scheduling execution, rollback/lockstep execution, lifecycle execution, resident mutation, scene mutation, or broad renderer-quality claims.

validationRecipes.name: installed-2d-sandbox-package-budget-smoke
validationRecipes.purpose: Build the selected 2D desktop runtime package proof and validate the installed sandbox package budget smoke with --require-sandbox-package-budgets, expecting sandbox_package_budget_status=ready, deterministic rows=89, row_limit=256, byte_limit=7409, chunk_bytes=7408, dirty_chunks=2, renderer_draw_rows=5, tile_draw_calls=2, light_rows=3, persisted_chunks=2, streaming load/unload rows=1, positive replay hash, and zero unsupported side-effect counters. The intentional --force-sandbox-package-budget-overflow negative probe is source-tree CTest only and is not part of installed package validation.

validationRecipes.name: desktop-runtime-2d-runtime-ui-production-stack-proof
validationRecipes.purpose: Build the selected 2D desktop runtime package proof and validate Runtime UI Production Stack Evidence v1 through --require-runtime-ui-production-stack counters, including shaping direction/script/language rows, glyph ids/clusters/advances/offsets/fallback/bidi/line-break evidence, glyph bitmap/metrics/pixel-format rows, atlas placement/budget/eviction rows, renderer upload handoff, IME session begin/end, composition, candidate, text-area/cursor, committed text, clipboard, selected platform adapter proof, per-platform host gates, accessibility role/name/description/state/focus/action/relationship/live-region/keyboard-pattern/publication-status rows, Microsoft UI Automation host gates, accessibility per-platform host gates, dependency/host gates, unsupported-claim rejection, runtime_ui_production_stack_status=host_evidence_required, reviewed selected package evidence, six rows, four ready rows, two host-gated rows, zero dependency-gated/skipped/adapter-invoked/unsupported rows, runtime_ui_production_stack_ime_platform_adapter_proof_rows=1, runtime_ui_production_stack_ime_platform_host_gate_rows=1, runtime_ui_production_stack_ime_platform_parity_ready=0, runtime_ui_production_stack_accessibility_uia_host_gate_rows=1, runtime_ui_production_stack_accessibility_platform_host_gate_rows=1, runtime_ui_production_stack_accessibility_platform_parity_ready=0, zero adapter/native/renderer-upload invocation fields, zero diagnostics, and a positive replay hash without claiming production text shaping, real font loading/rasterization, native IME parity, OS accessibility publication, renderer texture upload execution, UI middleware, or broad platform UI parity.

validationRecipes.name: desktop-runtime-2d-runtime-ui-renderer-atlas-handoff-proof
validationRecipes.purpose: Build the selected 2D desktop runtime package proof and validate Runtime UI Renderer Atlas Handoff v1 through --require-runtime-ui-renderer-atlas-handoff counters, including runtime/assets/2d/hud.uiatlas, runtime_ui_renderer_atlas_handoff_status=ready, one image atlas page/binding, one glyph atlas page/binding, two placement rows, two budget rows, one texture handoff row, one renderer counter row, two renderer sprites submitted, zero unresolved resources, zero unsupported claims, zero side effects, zero renderer upload invocation, zero diagnostics, and a positive replay hash without claiming renderer texture upload execution, source image decoding, live glyph atlas generation, font loading/rasterization, text shaping, native/RHI handles, or broad UI renderer quality.

validationRecipes.name: desktop-runtime-2d-vulkan-window-package
validationRecipes.purpose: On a ready Windows/Vulkan host with DXC SPIR-V CodeGen and spirv-val, build the selected 2D desktop runtime package proof and validate installed sample_2d_desktop_runtime_package with packaged SPIR-V shader artifacts, --require-vulkan-renderer smoke args, presentation_selected=vulkan, cooked 2D scene validation, sprite/HUD/audio counters, and no public native/RHI handle exposure. This remains a strict host/toolchain-gated presentation smoke, not broad production sprite batching readiness, Metal, or broad renderer-quality readiness.

validationRecipes.name: desktop-runtime-generated-material-shader-scaffold-package
validationRecipes.purpose: Build the selected generated desktop runtime material/shader scaffold lane and validate installed sample_generated_desktop_runtime_material_shader_package with manifest-derived config and cooked scene package files, source material/HLSL authoring inputs kept out of runtimePackageFiles, target-specific D3D12 scene/postprocess DXIL artifacts, host-owned D3D12 scene GPU bindings, Frame Graph/Postprocess v0 status through backend-neutral presentation report fields, modern material package counters including modern_material_variants=1, modern_material_ready=1, modern_material_diagnostics=0, modern_material_texture_dependencies=1, modern_material_shader_evidence_ready=1, modern_material_d3d12_shader_evidence_ready=1, modern_material_vulkan_shader_evidence_ready=0, and modern_material_selected_shader_evidence_ready=1, plus package-visible reviewed shader generation/cache counters with shader_generation_cache_reviewed=1, shader_generation_cache_ready_rows=2, shader_generation_cache_host_gated_rows=2, shader_generation_cache_d3d12_rows=2, shader_generation_cache_vulkan_rows=2, shader_generation_cache_spirv_validation_rows=0, shader_generation_cache_key_rows=2, shader_generation_cache_provenance_rows=2, and live/runtime/native/renderer/Metal readiness counters at 0. The source-tree counterpart is covered by the desktop-game-runtime recipe through the DXC-available sample_generated_desktop_runtime_material_shader_package_shader_artifacts_smoke CTest.

validationRecipes.name: desktop-runtime-generated-material-shader-scaffold-package-vulkan-strict
validationRecipes.purpose: On a ready Windows host with DXC SPIR-V CodeGen and spirv-val, build and validate installed sample_generated_desktop_runtime_material_shader_package with packaged SPIR-V scene/postprocess artifacts, spirv-val --target-env vulkan1.3 evidence, modern_material_vulkan_shader_evidence_ready=1, modern_material_selected_shader_evidence_ready=1, shader_generation_cache_vulkan_ready=1, shader_generation_cache_ready_rows=4, shader_generation_cache_host_gated_rows=0, shader_generation_cache_spirv_validation_rows=2, shader_generation_cache_key_rows=4, and shader_generation_cache_provenance_rows=4, matching the per-game desktop-runtime-release-target-vulkan-toolchain-gated recipe row. This is strict shader artifact/cache/provenance evidence for the material/shader scaffold lane; it does not require --require-vulkan-renderer, --require-scene-gpu-bindings, or --require-postprocess, and it does not claim Vulkan renderer residency, live shader generation, runtime compiler execution, native cache handles, Metal library generation, full mirakana_editor material-preview display parity, or cross-backend visual equivalence.

validationRecipes.purpose: Build the committed generated DesktopRuntime3DPackage proof and validate the selected D3D12 cooked UI atlas text-glyph package smoke with generated UI overlay DXIL artifacts, runtime/assets/3d/hud_text.uiatlas, hud_text_glyphs=2, text_glyphs_available=2, text_glyphs_resolved=2, text_glyphs_missing=0, text_glyph_sprites_submitted=2, ui_atlas_metadata_status=ready, ui_atlas_metadata_pages=1, ui_atlas_metadata_bindings=0, ui_atlas_metadata_glyphs=1, ui_texture_overlay_status=ready, ui_texture_overlay_atlas_ready=1, ui_texture_overlay_sprites_submitted=2, ui_texture_overlay_texture_binds=2, and ui_texture_overlay_draws=2 without claiming production text shaping, font rasterization, glyph atlas generation, runtime source image decoding, source image atlas packing, Metal overlay readiness, public native/RHI handles, or broad generated 3D production readiness.

validationRecipes.name: desktop-runtime-sample-game-vulkan-scene-gpu-package
validationRecipes.purpose: On a ready Windows/Vulkan host with DXC SPIR-V CodeGen and spirv-val, build the selected non-shell desktop runtime package lane and validate installed sample_desktop_runtime_game with target-specific scene/postprocess/shadow SPIR-V artifacts plus the sample-owned Vulkan mapping compute SPIR-V proof artifact, --require-vulkan-renderer smoke args, --require-scene-gpu-bindings, --require-postprocess, --require-postprocess-depth-input, --require-directional-shadow, --require-directional-shadow-filtering, --require-renderer-quality-gates, Lit Material v0 position+normal+uv/base-color/direct-light shader behavior, presentation_selected=vulkan, postprocess_status=ready, postprocess_depth_input_ready=1, directional_shadow_status=ready, directional_shadow_ready=1, directional_shadow_filter_mode=fixed_pcf_3x3, directional_shadow_filter_taps=9, directional_shadow_filter_radius_texels=1, renderer_quality_status=ready, renderer_quality_expected_framegraph_render_passes=6, renderer_quality_expected_framegraph_barrier_steps=15, renderer_quality_framegraph_render_passes_ok=1, renderer_quality_framegraph_barrier_steps_ok=1, renderer_quality_framegraph_execution_budget_ok=1, framegraph_passes=3, framegraph_passes_executed=6, framegraph_render_passes_recorded=6, framegraph_barrier_steps_executed=15, and backend-neutral Vulkan scene GPU binding counters.

validationRecipes.name: desktop-runtime-sample-game-native-ui-overlay-package
validationRecipes.purpose: Build the selected non-shell desktop runtime package lane and validate installed sample_desktop_runtime_game on the primary D3D12 Windows path with renderer-owned native GPU runtime UI overlay output for MK_ui_renderer box/image-placeholder sprite submissions, target-specific UI overlay DXIL artifacts, ui_overlay_requested=1, ui_overlay_status=ready, ui_overlay_ready=1, and positive ui_overlay_sprites_submitted/ui_overlay_draws while keeping production text/font/image/atlas/accessibility unsupported.

validationRecipes.name: desktop-runtime-sample-game-vulkan-native-ui-overlay-package
validationRecipes.purpose: On a ready Windows/Vulkan host with DXC SPIR-V CodeGen and spirv-val, validate the same renderer-owned native GPU runtime UI overlay proof through strict Vulkan package smoke with target-specific UI overlay SPIR-V artifacts plus the sample-owned Vulkan mapping compute SPIR-V proof artifact, presentation_selected=vulkan, ui_overlay_requested=1, ui_overlay_status=ready, ui_overlay_ready=1, and positive ui_overlay_sprites_submitted/ui_overlay_draws.

validationRecipes.name: desktop-runtime-sample-game-textured-ui-atlas-package
validationRecipes.purpose: Build the selected non-shell desktop runtime package lane and validate installed sample_desktop_runtime_game on the primary D3D12 Windows path with a renderer-owned sampled UI sprite bound from cooked texture metadata through UiRendererImageBinding atlas_page/uv_rect, --require-native-ui-textured-sprite-atlas, ui_texture_overlay_requested=1, ui_texture_overlay_status=ready, ui_texture_overlay_atlas_ready=1, and positive ui_texture_overlay_sprites_submitted/ui_texture_overlay_texture_binds/ui_texture_overlay_draws while runtime image decoding and production atlas/editor/runtime integration beyond the reviewed source-image decode and atlas-packing tools, text/font/accessibility, Metal, public native handles, and broad UI renderer quality remain unsupported.

validationRecipes.name: desktop-runtime-sample-game-vulkan-textured-ui-atlas-package
validationRecipes.purpose: On a ready Windows/Vulkan host with DXC SPIR-V CodeGen and spirv-val, validate the same cooked texture/atlas-backed UI sprite proof through strict Vulkan package smoke with target-specific UI overlay SPIR-V artifacts plus the sample-owned Vulkan mapping compute SPIR-V proof artifact, presentation_selected=vulkan, ui_texture_overlay_requested=1, ui_texture_overlay_status=ready, ui_texture_overlay_atlas_ready=1, and positive ui_texture_overlay_sprites_submitted/ui_texture_overlay_texture_binds/ui_texture_overlay_draws.

validationRecipes.name: desktop-runtime-sample-game-ui-atlas-metadata-package
validationRecipes.purpose: Build the selected sample_desktop_runtime_game desktop runtime package and validate that first-party cooked UI atlas package metadata is installed, loaded through MK_runtime, converted into UiRendererImagePalette bindings by MK_ui_renderer, and reported with ui_atlas_metadata_status=ready, ui_atlas_metadata_pages=1, ui_atlas_metadata_bindings=1, plus the existing ready textured UI overlay fields.

validationRecipes.name: desktop-runtime-sample-game-vulkan-ui-atlas-metadata-package
validationRecipes.purpose: On a ready Windows/Vulkan host with DXC SPIR-V CodeGen, spirv-val, and Vulkan runtime readiness, validate the same UI atlas package metadata proof through strict Vulkan package smoke with the sample-owned Vulkan mapping compute SPIR-V proof artifact, presentation_selected=vulkan, framegraph_passes=3, ui_atlas_metadata_status=ready, ui_atlas_metadata_pages=1, ui_atlas_metadata_bindings=1, and ready textured UI overlay counters.

validationRecipes.name: shader-toolchain
validationRecipes.purpose: Report D3D12 DXIL, Vulkan SPIR-V, DXC SPIR-V CodeGen, spirv-val, Metal, and metallib readiness, using MK_SHADER_TOOLCHAIN_ROOT, User/Machine PATH, Vulkan SDK variables, vcpkg tool roots, and Windows SDK fallback discovery.

validationRecipes.name: dev-windows-editor-game-module-driver-load-tests
validationRecipes.purpose: On Windows with MSVC dev preset tooling, configure dev, build MK_editor_game_module_driver_probe and MK_editor_game_module_driver_load_tests, and run CTest MK_editor_game_module_driver_load_tests for same-engine-build DLL load, factory resolution, isolated session tick, stopped-state unload plus second load, and paired DynamicLibrary refcount ordering without mirakana_editor execution, active-session hot reload, or stable third-party ABI claims.

validationRecipes.name: dependency-policy
validationRecipes.purpose: Verify vcpkg, dependency docs, and third-party notice policy.

validationRecipes.name: asset-importers
validationRecipes.purpose: Validate optional PNG, glTF, and common audio source importer adapters behind MK_tools.

validationRecipes.name: physics-jolt
validationRecipes.purpose: Validate the optional Jolt Physics adapter lane behind MK_physics_jolt, including physics-jolt configure/build/CTest, install/export, and an installed SDK consumer that links mirakana::physics_jolt when Mirakanai_HAS_PHYSICS_JOLT is true.

validationRecipes.name: network-production-security
validationRecipes.purpose: Validate the first-party networking production security gate, networking foundation, transport adapter facade, and replication review tests, including threat-model, session lifecycle, connection state, channel policy, sequence/replay rejection, input command validation, snapshot validation, sandbox mutation command and snapshot delta review, duplicate command-id rejection, shared snapshot/delta byte-budget rejection, rollback-window diagnostics, and host-gated loopback/replication separation without broad online-service claims.

validationRecipes.name: audio-production
validationRecipes.purpose: Validate Audio Production Playback/Streaming/DSP/Spatialization Evidence v1, including review_audio_production_readiness over decoded source, streaming chunk, conversion, budget, DSP graph, spatial/listener, HRTF host-gate, device lifecycle, unsupported-claim, side-effect, selected-package, production-readiness, diagnostic, and replay-hash rows plus WASAPI callback-free device lifecycle evidence without broad codec, middleware, HRTF execution, background streaming, native-handle, or general production audio quality claims.

validationRecipes.name: wasapi-audio
validationRecipes.command: pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File tools/cmake.ps1 --build --preset dev --target MK_audio_tests MK_wasapi_audio_tests; pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File tools/ctest.ps1 --preset dev --output-on-failure -R "MK_audio_tests|MK_wasapi_audio_tests"
validationRecipes.purpose: Validate the Windows-native MK_audio_wasapi shared-mode playback foundation, including COM/default-endpoint planning rows, IAudioClient/IAudioRenderClient private adapter contracts, queue-space clamping, silence submission, pause/resume/clear lifecycle evidence, and public-header native-handle isolation without SDL3 audio.

validationRecipes.name: desktop-runtime-2d-audio-production-proof
validationRecipes.purpose: Build the selected 2D desktop runtime package proof and validate audio_production_* counters for reviewed decoded source, streaming chunk, conversion, DSP, spatial/listener, HRTF host gate, device lifecycle, unsupported-claim, side-effect, diagnostic, and replay-hash evidence. Installed validation expects audio_production_status=host_evidence_required, selected package evidence ready, device and HRTF host evidence unavailable, zero codec/background/middleware/HRTF/device-callback/device-IO side effects, two host-gate diagnostics, and a positive replay hash without claiming broad codec support, middleware parity, HRTF execution parity, background streaming execution, native handles, or general production audio quality.

validationRecipes.name: desktop-runtime-3d-audio-production-proof
validationRecipes.purpose: Build the selected generated 3D desktop runtime package proof and validate audio_production_* counters from the cooked gameplay audio payload. Installed validation expects audio_production_status=host_evidence_required, selected package evidence ready, device and HRTF host evidence unavailable, zero codec/background/middleware/HRTF/device-callback/device-IO side effects, two host-gate diagnostics, and a positive replay hash without claiming broad codec support, middleware parity, HRTF execution parity, background streaming execution, native handles, or general production audio quality.

validationRecipes.name: network-enet
validationRecipes.purpose: Validate the optional ENet network adapter lane behind MK_runtime_network_enet, including network-enet configure/build/CTest for the transport adapter and production security gate targets, local reliable/unreliable loopback host evidence, install/export, and an installed SDK consumer that links mirakana::runtime_network_enet when Mirakanai_HAS_NETWORK_ENET is true.

validationRecipes.name: release-package
validationRecipes.purpose: Build Release, run Release tests, validate installed SDK metadata, validate an installed SDK consumer project, create the CPack package artifact, validate the current ZIP SHA-256 sidecar, and inspect archived SDK metadata/tool/doc/license entries.

validationRecipes.name: installed-sdk
validationRecipes.purpose: Validate installed SDK metadata payloads, then build examples/installed_consumer against an installed GameEngine package without source-tree include paths.

validationRecipes.name: mobile-packaging
validationRecipes.purpose: Validate mobile packaging templates and report Android SDK/NDK/JDK/Gradle/AVD/device or Apple full-Xcode/iOS-SDK/iOS-runtime blockers explicitly without faking package readiness.

validationRecipes.name: ios-simulator-smoke
validationRecipes.purpose: On macOS/Xcode hosts, build the iOS Simulator bundle, install it with xcrun simctl, verify the app container, launch it, and clean up the simulator state.
